heading: Liability for acts of officers and agents
label: 70111 Liability for acts of officers and agents
text: The corporation is liable for the acts of its officers and agents acting within the scope of their authority.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7011136:5609., , .Sept. 23, 1996Pub. L. 104–201, title XVIII, § 1809110 Stat. 2762The words “officers and agents” are substituted for “officers, directors, employees, and agents” for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate unnecessary words.
